metadata.title: Generate a compliance evidence prompt for an audit agent operating under the operator lens, targeting Latin American enterprise compliance requirements, with explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a compliance evidence prompt for an audit agent operating under the operator lens, targeting Latin American enterprise compliance requirements, with explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.
mission.success_definition: Output is a valid compliance_evidence_prompt artifact.; All five compiled_intent sections are present and populated.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and trigger on policy/claim violations.; Artifact can be directly consumed by an audit agent without manual interpretation.

in_scope.item: The prompt must handle artifact_type_ambiguity, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must produce a governed artifact with clear objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Output is a valid compliance_evidence_prompt artifact.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All five compiled_intent sections are present and populated.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and trigger on policy/claim violations.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Artifact can be directly consumed by an audit agent without manual interpretation.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.evidence_goal: Generate a compliance evidence prompt for an audit agent operating under the operator lens, targeting Latin American enterprise compliance requirements, with explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.
SRXML_Artifact.source_policy: Use primary sources and label unsupported claims.

evidence_items.item: The prompt must handle artifact_type_ambiguity, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must produce a governed artifact with clear objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.

claim_limits.item: Must comply with Latin American regulatory frameworks (e.g., LGPD, GDPR-equivalent local laws).
Must include validation gates for source policy and claim limits.
Must reject or flag ambiguous or incomplete inputs with explicit reasoning.
Must be SR8-compilable: all sections must be machine-parseable and actionable.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
